_meta.description: Schema for a chunk-level record in the Oil Painting Research Assistant. One record per retrievable chunk. chunk_id is the ChromaDB document ID. All enum values must match controlled_vocabulary.json.
_meta.chroma_note: The retrieval_critical_fields list below defines which fields must be present in ChromaDB metadata. Full records are stored in the metadata store. ChromaDB accepts only str, int, float, bool — list fields are pipe-encoded strings.

chunk_id.description: Unique chunk ID. Used as the ChromaDB document ID. Never regenerated after initial assignment.

source_id.description: Parent source ID. Must match an existing source register record.

chunk_index.description: Sequential position of this chunk within its source (0-based).

chunk_title.description: Short semantic label describing the content of this chunk. Not a generic heading copy.

section_path.description: Dot-separated section hierarchy path from the source document.

page_range.description: Page range if applicable. Null if not a paginated source.

text.description: Full text content of this chunk as indexed.

token_estimate.description: Approximate token count. Used for size validation and retrieval context budgeting.

domain.description: Primary knowledge domain of this chunk. May differ from source domain.

subdomain.description: Specific area within the domain. May differ from source subdomain.

materials_mentioned.description: Canonical material names in this chunk. Use material_alias_map.json canonical_name values.

pigment_codes.description: Pigment codes in this chunk (e.g. PW1, PB29). Empty list if none.

binder_types.description: Canonical binder/medium terms in this chunk.

historical_period.description: Historical period scope of this chunk's content.

artist_or_school.description: Artists or schools referenced in this chunk. Empty list if not applicable.

question_types_supported.description: Question classes this chunk helps answer.

claim_types_present.description: Evidence types present in this chunk.

case_specificity.description: Whether this chunk is case-specific, broadly applicable, mixed, or unknown.

citability.description: How this chunk may be cited in an answer.

approval_state.description: Operational retrieval gate. Determines which contexts this chunk may be served in.

retrieval_weight_hint.description: Optional manual boost value to adjust retrieval prominence. Null if not set.

quality_flags.description: Quality issues identified during chunking or review. Empty list if clean.

restriction_flags.description: Operational restriction flags. Empty list if none.

review_status.description: Current metadata review state of this chunk.

duplicate_cluster_id.description: ID of the duplicate cluster this chunk belongs to, if any. Null if unique.

source_family.description: Propagated from parent source record at indexing time.

source_type.description: Propagated from parent source record at indexing time.

trust_tier.description: Propagated from parent source record at indexing time. Used for tier-aware reranking without source lookup.

source_title.description: Propagated from parent source record short_title at indexing time.

citation_format.description: Propagated from parent source record at indexing time. Used in citation assembly.
